description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint, featuring horizontally laid dark timber planks and a stone foundation. The roof is a steeply pitched gable style, covered with reddish-brown shingles that extend over a wide front porch. The porch is supported by simple wooden posts and is enclosed by a wooden railing, providing a sheltered outdoor space. Windows are rectangular and asymmetrically distributed, with some grouped and others isolated, framed in wood. There is a single visible door on the right side of the porch, leading into the cabin. The overall appearance is robust and traditional, suitable for a rural or suburban neighborhood setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, stone foundation, and a wide front porch with wooden railings and asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: The side view shows the cabin's dark timber planks, two small windows, and the stone foundation, with the gable roof sloping down.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the wide porch with wooden railings, the main entrance door, and several windows above and beside the porch.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the porch extending along the cabin, a single door, and two windows, with the gable roof visible above.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a plain wall with three windows—one large and two small—set in the timber facade, and the stone foundation below.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and overhanging eaves, covered in reddish-brown shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with five visible rectangular windows: two small on the left side, three on the rear (one large, two small), and several distributed along the front and right sides, some grouped and others isolated
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the right side of the porch, adjacent to the front facade
